name: Emergency Stop Braking Analysis
description: A safety engineering team is commissioning a new robot cell. Validate the robot's dynamic stopping distance by simulating an Emergency Stop (E-stop) at 5 different base joint velocities using a braking torque of 50 N·m. Export the braking time and distance analysis to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/braking_analysis.csv (columns: test_id, initial_velocity_rad_s, brake_torque_nm, braking_time_s, braking_distance_rad) and a summary to safety_report.json (fields: total_tests, max_braking_distance_rad, max_braking_time_s, average_deceleration_rad_s2). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
